summary: Completed testing of iteration 20 features: Account Setup dialog, Settings Links tab, Change License Type, Sidebar visibility, Onboarding blur, and View Invite Dialog. All major features working correctly.

minor.issue: Was using wrong MongoDB filter (id: platform_settings instead of {}). Fixed during testing.
No public /api/settings endpoint exists - LoginPage uses /api/settings/platform which works without auth

critical_code_review_comments: Backend: Fixed verify-heartbeat endpoint to use correct MongoDB filter {} instead of {id: platform_settings}
Frontend: Added settingsAPI.get() method to api.js for LoginPage to fetch custom_registration_link
seed_data_creation: Updated platform_settings with heartbeat_api_key for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 20 features verified: 1) Login Page Account Setup dialog with Yes/No membership question works, 2) Settings Links tab with External Registration Link field works, 3) Sidebar Deposit/Withdrawal visible for all users including licensees, 4) Admin Licenses has Change Type button in Active Licenses tab, 5) Member Details Actions tab has Change Type button, 6) View Invite Dialog properly contained, 7) Onboarding overlay uses bg-black/40 (less blur)

login_page_account_setup.details: Don't have an account/password? link opens Account Setup dialog with Yes/No membership question

settings_links_tab.details: Links tab present with External Registration Link field, custom_registration_link saved to platform_settings

sidebar_deposit_withdrawal.details: Deposit/Withdrawal link visible for master admin and licensee users

admin_licenses_change_type.details: Change Type button present in Active Licenses tab for each license

member_details_change_type.details: Change Type button present in Member Details Actions tab for licensed members

view_invite_dialog.details: Dialog properly contained (448x467 pixels), no overflow issues

onboarding_blur.details: Overlay uses bg-black/40 class (less blur than previous bg-black/70)
